drill: REAL-1.1 — real-answer end-to-end value-loop proof: /note → retrieval → grounded-answer round-trip with real OpenAI embeddings (D-024) + real OpenAI chat (D-037) (D-073 prep / REAL-1.1 capture)

metadata.environment: real backend — STORAGE_BACKEND=postgres, EMBEDDING_BACKEND=openai, EMBEDDING_MODEL=text-embedding-3-large, EMBEDDING_DIMENSION=3072, CHAT_BACKEND=openai, CHAT_MODEL=gpt-4.1; OP-1 migrations applied; OP-2 bounded retry/backoff active at defaults; webhook secret set
metadata.notes: Live operator evidence for the real-answer end-to-end value-loop proof. Per the REAL-1 redaction rule (RUNBOOK §"Real-answer end-to-end smoke (REAL-1 / D-073)"), credential-bearing values (OPENAI_API_KEY, TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN, TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET, PUBLIC_HOSTNAME if used, webhook URL token) are replaced by <REDACTED> placeholders or a _redacted: true flag; structural outcomes (status strings, log-line shapes, row counts, fallback_mode values, prompt_version, latency_ms numeric magnitudes) are preserved verbatim. Operator action required before commit: (1) copy this file to docs/real-answer-drill/real-answer-smoke-<YYYYMMDD>-evidence.json (UTC-dated), (2) drop the top-level "_template": true flag, (3) replace every <TO_FILL_BY_OPERATOR> placeholder with the verbatim captured observation, (4) run the redaction grep checklist from the RUNBOOK subsection.

preflight_state.boot_log_line_shape: app.created env=<env> version=<version> embedding_backend=openai embedding_dim=3072 chat_backend=openai chat_model=gpt-4.1
preflight_state.boot_log_line_verbatim: <TO_FILL_BY_OPERATOR — verbatim app.created line from docker compose logs app; expected: embedding_backend=openai embedding_dim=3072 chat_backend=openai chat_model=gpt-4.1>
preflight_state.boot_gate_notes: _verify_embedding_contour and _verify_chat_contour in src/memory_rag/app.py abort start on any canonical-knob mismatch (R-10); a successful app.created line implies both gates passed.

message.text: <TO_FILL_BY_OPERATOR — e.g. "/note 2026-05-09\nHad a calm morning\nTried a new book">

post_ingest_row_counts.event_chunks_delta: <TO_FILL_BY_OPERATOR — expected: +N where N matches the count in the reply>

event_chunks_status_transition.after_observed: <TO_FILL_BY_OPERATOR — expected: ready for every chunk in this /note>

note_round_trip.provider_attempt_log_line_verbatim: <TO_FILL_BY_OPERATOR — verbatim line from grep 'provider.attempt' on app logs for the embedding call; attempt=2/3 outcome=success is acceptable if a transient 429 occurred>

response.user_facing_reply_verbatim: <TO_FILL_BY_OPERATOR — verbatim text the LLM produced through QueryService.answer; expected to reference the saved note content>

answer_traces_row.context_chunk_ids_non_empty: <TO_FILL_BY_OPERATOR — expected: true; the post-RRF top-k chunks fed to the LLM>
answer_traces_row.answer_text_verbatim: <TO_FILL_BY_OPERATOR — verbatim AnswerTrace.answer_text; should match user-facing reply modulo any dispatcher trailer>

ask_round_trip.provider_attempt_log_line_verbatim: <TO_FILL_BY_OPERATOR — verbatim line from grep 'provider.attempt' on app logs for the chat call; attempt=2/3 outcome=success is acceptable if a transient 429 occurred>

out_of_scope_for_this_packet: Any src/ / scripts / docker-compose.yml / schema / migration / tests/ change.
Any live OpenAI call inside make check or any new gated test.
Any harness extension, new aggregate, or retrieval/answer-path behavior change.
Resilience-knob tuning beyond D-047 / D-049 defaults.
RouteKind.ENTRY → NOTE / Note / D-026 rename work.
Slice 3.7 dual-config tsvector and the unresolved D-038 Postgres baseline capture.
Multi-run / multi-query / multi-language statistical capture — the milestone is a one-shot value-loop proof.

summary.note_round_trip_green: <TO_FILL_BY_OPERATOR — expected: true if POST /telegram/webhook for /note returned 200, every chunk reached embedding_status=ready, and embedding_records carried model_name=text-embedding-3-large at dim 3072>
summary.ask_round_trip_green: <TO_FILL_BY_OPERATOR — expected: true if POST /telegram/webhook for /ask returned 200 and answer_traces carried fallback_mode=none, model_name=gpt-4.1, non-empty context_chunk_ids, non-zero latency_ms, non-empty token_counts>
summary.answer_grounded: <TO_FILL_BY_OPERATOR — expected: true if the user-facing reply text references the saved /note content and answer_traces.fallback_mode=none>
